name: whatsapp_send_message
description: Send text messages to WhatsApp contacts using the WhatsApp Business API. Supports text formatting, emojis, and basic message types. IMPORTANT: Phone numbers must be in international format without '+' (e.g., '14155552671' for US number).

phone_number_id.description: Your WhatsApp Business Phone Number ID (required for API calls)

to.description: Recipient phone number in international format without '+' (e.g., '14155552671')

type.description: Message type: 'text' for free-form messages, 'template' for pre-approved templates

body.description: Message text content. Supports basic formatting and emojis

preview_url.description: Generate preview for URLs in the message

recipient_type.description: Type of recipient: individual contact or group

message_id.description: Message ID to reply to (for threaded conversations)

phone_number_id.description: Auto-extract phone number ID from whatsapp_get_phone_numbers results

text.body: Hello! This is a test message from your AI assistant.
Check out our latest update: https://example.com/news
Thanks for your message! I'll get back to you soon.
Hello everyone! This is a group message.

notes: Phone numbers must be in international format without '+' prefix
Text messages support basic formatting and emojis
URLs in messages can generate previews when preview_url is true
Message delivery status can be tracked using whatsapp_get_message_status
Business hours and template messages have different rate limits
Group messages require the group ID, not individual phone numbers
